div1.entryFree:
Beaver, 1) the visor of the helmet: their armed staves in charge, their --s down, H4B IV, 1, 120. and faintly through a rusty b. peeps, H5 IV, 2, 44. I'll hide my silver beard in a gold b. Troil. I, 3, 296. he wore his b. up, Hml. I, 2, 230.
2) the helmet: I saw young Harry, with his b. on, H4A IV, 1, 104. I cleft his b., H6C I, 1, 12. is my b. easier than it was? R3 V, 3, 50.
